_comment: Explicit stat overrides for specific items by FormKey (format: 'XXXXXX:PluginName.esm').
_comment2: Weapons use 'damage' (integer). Armor/shields use 'armorRating' (float). Both fields are optional — omit what you don't want to change.
_comment3: These overrides are applied AFTER the global multipliers and bypass all other logic.
